description: Add contract scan PDF upload feature (backend + frontend) and notes field for renters/staff (backend + frontend). Create migration file for both features.
steps: 1. Create backend/migrations/004_new_features.sql with: ALTER TABLE contracts ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS scan_pdf_url TEXT; ALTER TABLE renter_profiles ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS notes TEXT; ALTER TABLE profiles ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS notes TEXT;
2. Update backend/app/models/contract.py: Add scan_pdf_url: Optional[str] = None to ContractResponse class and ContractDetailResponse will inherit it.

3. Update backend/app/services/contract_service.py: (a) Add scan_pdf_url to the _enrich_contract function return dict. (b) Add new function upload_scan_pdf(contract_id, org_id, file_bytes) that uploads to Supabase Storage bucket 'contracts' with path {org_id}/scans/{contract_id}_scan.pdf, then updates the contract record with scan_pdf_url. Follow the pattern in renter_service.upload_id_photo.

4. Update backend/app/routers/contracts.py: Add POST /{contract_id}/upload-scan endpoint accepting UploadFile, secured with require_roles(['owner', 'manager']), calling contract_service.upload_scan_pdf. Import UploadFile and File from fastapi.
5. Update backend/app/models/renter.py: Add notes: Optional[str] = None to RenterCreate, RenterUpdate, and RenterDetailResponse classes.

6. Update backend/app/services/renter_service.py: Include 'notes' field in create_renter (renter_data dict) and in get_renter_detail (result dict). The update_renter already uses model_dump(exclude_none=True) so it will handle notes automatically.
7. Update backend/app/models/staff.py: Add notes: Optional[str] = None to StaffResponse class.
8. Update backend/app/services/staff_service.py: Include 'notes' in the result dict of list_staff function (read from profile.get('notes')).
9. Update frontend/src/types/contract.ts: Add scan_pdf_url?: string to Contract interface.

10. Update frontend/src/api/contracts.ts: Add uploadContractScan(contractId: string, file: File) function using FormData and multipart/form-data header, following the pattern in frontend/src/api/renters.ts uploadIdFront.

11. Update frontend/src/pages/contracts/ContractFormPage.tsx: In step 4 (preview), add a file upload input accepting .pdf with label 'Tai len ban scan hop dong (PDF)' in Vietnamese with diacritics. Store selected file in state. After contract creation (in handleSaveDraft and handleActivate success callbacks), if a file is selected, call uploadContractScan. Show filename after selection.

12. Update frontend/src/pages/contracts/ContractDetailPage.tsx: After the existing PDF buttons, if contract.scan_pdf_url exists, show a prominently styled blue button with document icon text 'Xem hop dong Scan' (in Vietnamese with diacritics) that opens the URL in a new tab.
13. Update frontend/src/types/renter.ts: Add notes?: string to RenterCreate, RenterUpdate, and RenterDetail interfaces.

14. Update frontend/src/pages/renters/RenterFormPage.tsx: Add a textarea field 'Ghi chu' at the bottom of the form (before the submit buttons section), as a new section. Include notes in the form state and updateField.

15. Update frontend/src/pages/renters/RenterDetailPage.tsx: In the 'notes' tab content (activeTab === 'notes'), display renter.notes if it exists, otherwise show 'Chua co ghi chu' message in Vietnamese with diacritics.

16. Update frontend/src/pages/staff/StaffListPage.tsx: Add a 'Ghi chu' column to the staff table showing member.notes if present, or '-' if not. Add notes?: string to the local type or ensure it works with the existing StaffMember type from types/task.ts.
acceptance_criteria: backend/migrations/004_new_features.sql exists with all three ALTER TABLE statements
POST /api/v1/contracts/{id}/upload-scan endpoint exists in contracts router
RenterCreate, RenterUpdate, RenterDetailResponse models have notes field
renter_service create_renter and get_renter_detail include notes
staff_service list_staff includes notes in result
ContractFormPage has PDF file upload input
ContractDetailPage shows 'Xem hop dong Scan' button when scan_pdf_url exists
RenterDetailPage notes tab shows actual notes content
Python files have valid syntax (python -m py_compile)
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/PWA-Quan-Ly-Nha-Tro/frontend && npm install && npx tsc --noEmit
